ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the order was placed */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the order was placed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the order was placed */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Furniture, Office Supplies) */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the order */,
  "order_month" INTEGER /* Month the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales representative */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Furniture, Office Supplies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the sales representative */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales representative operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sales representative record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sales representative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)
